fallback_contact.name: Ryan Van Damme

fallback_contact.rationale: Ironclad is a Winnipeg-HQ multi-family developer (since 2014, ~$160M revenue, 94 employees) with national presence. They're VERTICALLY INTEGRATED — own land acquisition through construction through property management. They're also actively HIRING a Senior Estimator right now to support multifamily construction. RECOMMENDED ANGLE: pitch to Ryan or Kevin Dumontier (also surfaced in search). Multi-family residential = MASSIVE recurring paint scope (turnover painting between tenants). This is one of the strongest fit + opportunity targets in the entire batch.
